text: For alloy GH2907, sampled from a ring component in the chord direction under Regime B, at 20°C, the shear strength τ is 915 MPa.
For alloy GH2907, sampled from a ring component in the chord direction under Regime B, at 200°C, the shear strength τ is 678 MPa.
For alloy GH2907, sampled from a ring component in the chord direction under Regime B, at 300°C, the shear strength τ is 696 MPa.
For alloy GH2907, sampled from a ring component in the chord direction under Regime B, at 400°C, the shear strength τ is 679 MPa.
For alloy GH2909, sampled from a ring component in the chord direction, heat-treated under Regime Ⅰ, at 20°C, the shear strength τ is 852 MPa.
